goals: Discover what types of unit conversions are available
Explore units in a category relevant to health or wellness topics
Perform a practical conversion for a specific use case
Get detailed information about a category to understand conversion formulas

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and practical, interested in applying unit conversions to everyday health and lifestyle contexts. Values clear, actionable information.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Familiar with common measurement units but may not know metric/imperial equivalents or specific unit categories. Does not know tool names or internal APIs.

end_condition: The user has explored available conversion categories, identified relevant units, completed a practical conversion, and understands the category details for their intended use case.
